title: Gate 23: Splitting Apart
description: You receive insights that dissolve old ways of seeing — ideas that can sound like genius or madness depending on timing. Wait to be invited before sharing your insights; the right moment determines whether they land.
learningGoal: The viewer understands what Gate 23 (Splitting Apart — Expressing essential truth through necessary dissolution) means in their daily life, in plain terms.
keyPoints: You receive insights that dissolve old ways of seeing
ideas that can sound like genius or madness depending on timing.
Wait to be invited before sharing your insights; the right moment determines whether they land.
forbiddenClaims: a gate guarantees a talent you do not have to develop
gates rank people as better or worse
an activated gate forces a fixed behaviour

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: Gate 23: Splitting Apart — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: Gate 23: Splitting Apart — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.hook: Gate 23: Splitting Apart — try this today.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: Gate 23: Splitting Apart — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: Gate 23: Splitting Apart — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: You receive insights that dissolve old ways of seeing — ideas that can sound like genius or madness depending on timing. Wait to be invited before sharing your insights; the right moment determines whether they land.
